details.test: Task 1: Start watching a short highly-rated video flow
Task 2: Create public playlist with three videos and reorder by views
Task 3: Follow a channel and save a latest long video to Watch Later
Task 4: Subscribe to cheapest monthly ad-free 4K plan
Task 5: Set playback quality to 1080p, English subtitles always on, autoplay off
Task 6: Add a long video to new "Weekend Docs" watchlist
Task 7: Follow a channel and enable live-only notifications
Task 8: Enable parental controls and create restricted kids profile
Task 9: Clean up gaming history and mark gaming recommendations as not interested
